entry.title: Your Life Events
entry.subtitle: These can be hard to revisit — but each dated event helps pin down your birth time, which sharpens the most time-sensitive parts of your chart. The more specific the date, the better.

honesty.near_tie: The events you provided do not clearly favour one candidate time over the other. Both are plausible. Only a recorded birth certificate can settle a near-tie — this result is a hypothesis, not a verdict.
honesty.leans: The evidence leans toward one candidate, but the margin is modest. Treat this as a working hypothesis to weigh against your lived experience — not a definitive finding.
honesty.consistent: The events consistently support the leading candidate. Even so, no algorithm replaces a recorded birth certificate. Use this time as a starting point, not a certainty.

signals.dasha_lord_in: Dasha lord is placed in the {{houseOrdinal}} house
signals.md_lord_rules: Major-period (maha dasha) lord rules the {{houseOrdinal}} house
signals.md_lord_in: Major-period (maha dasha) lord sits in the {{houseOrdinal}} house
signals.ad_lord_rules: Sub-period (antar dasha) lord rules the {{houseOrdinal}} house
signals.ad_lord_in: Sub-period (antar dasha) lord sits in the {{houseOrdinal}} house
signals.pd_lord_rules: Timed to the sub-sub-period (pratyantar): its lord rules the {{houseOrdinal}} house
signals.pd_lord_in: Timed to the sub-sub-period (pratyantar): its lord sits in the {{houseOrdinal}} house
signals.d9_lord_rules_d9_h7: The active period lord rules the partnership (7th) house of the navamsa (D9) chart
signals.d9_lord_in_d9_h7: The active period lord sits in the partnership (7th) house of the navamsa (D9) chart
signals.d9_lord_is_d9_lagna_lord: The active period lord rules the navamsa (D9) rising sign itself
signals.miss_unexplained: No active period explains this event — it counts against this candidate
signals.miss_silent: Predicted a strong {{category}} window with nothing reported
signals.prior_anchor: Closest to the recorded time — a gentle nudge, never a substitute for events
signals.qualifier_afflicted: the lord's weakened (afflicted) state matches this difficult event
signals.qualifier_dignified: the lord's dignified strength matches this fortunate event

honesty_qualifier.prior_influenced: One caveat: this lead depends on the gentle recorded-time nudge — on the events alone it would be a tie.
honesty_qualifier.penalty_driven: One caveat: this lead comes mostly from quiet periods counting against the other candidate, not from direct event matches.

results.title: Rectification Results
results.representative_caveat: This is a representative time for this window — not a claim to the exact minute.
results.near_tie_settle_note: Only a recorded birth certificate can settle a near-tie. Both candidates below are plausible — weigh them against your lived experience.
results.window_caveat: Events narrow the rising sign only, not the exact minute. The representative time shown is illustrative — it places you within the sign, not at a precise birth moment.
results.reason_balance: the balance of evidence between the candidates
results.d9_flip_callout: The navamsa (D9) rising sign changes roughly every 13 minutes — it helped separate these candidates.

window.heading: How sure are you about the recorded time?
window.body: Choose an honest window around the recorded time. A tighter window sharpens the search — and if you are not sure, let the engine scan the whole day instead.
window.as_recorded: It's exact, or within a few minutes
window.hour: Within about an hour either way
window.two_hours: Within about two hours either way
window.whole_day: I don't really know — search the whole day

intro.heading: Narrow your rising sign
intro.body: If your birth time is uncertain, life events can help narrow the window. The engine will test whether your recorded time — or a nearby candidate — better fits the pattern of events you enter.
intro.honesty: This is a hypothesis engine, not a verdict machine. A recorded birth certificate always wins. What you get is a ranked shortlist and an honest confidence label.

fit.heading: Analysing your events…
fit.body: The on-device engine is comparing candidate birth windows against your life events. This usually takes a few seconds.
fit.engine_warming: The chart engine is still warming up. The analysis will start automatically once it is ready.
fit.device_note: Fitting your events against candidate charts. This runs entirely on your device.
fit.stalled_note: Still working — this usually finishes within seconds. If it doesn't, you can retry.

status.warming_body: The first analysis loads the astronomy engine onto your device. This can take a minute or two the first time, then it's near-instant — {{elapsed}} elapsed.
status.stalled_title: This is taking longer than usual
status.stalled_body: The engine still hasn't finished starting up. You can reset and reload it to try again.

error.engine_failed_body: Something went wrong while loading the engine on your device. Reset and reload to try again.
error.missing_birth: We couldn't find saved birth details for this profile. Open this profile's settings to add a birth date, time and place, then try again.
error.no_events: Add at least one dated life event to begin — each event helps the engine compare candidate birth times.

accelerator.warning: What you type here — including any names or places — is sent to your configured AI endpoint. Only the extracted dates and event types stay on your device.

chat.opening: Hi! I'll ask you about one life event at a time — a marriage, a move, a career change. Start with any event you remember well, and tell me roughly when it happened.
chat.gated_note: AI chat requires a cloud endpoint. You can still add events manually below.
chat.error: I couldn't reach the AI just now — please try again, or enter events manually below.
chat.gather_error: I couldn't read that message for dated events, so it may not have been counted — please send it again, or add the event manually below.

summary.label: What happened
summary.placeholder: e.g. Moved to a new city for a job

tray.honesty: The engine ranks candidate rising signs and assigns a confidence band — not a definitive verdict. All computation runs on your device; no birth data leaves it.

reset.warning: This erases your chart, profiles, life events, chat and saved readings, then returns you to the start. Your language, AI settings and the already-downloaded engine are kept.
